_comment: dos-synth MIDI bridge configuration. All values can be overridden with CLI flags.

midi._input_comment: MIDI input device: 'auto' (first found), device name substring, or 0-based index.
midi._output_comment: 86Box MIDI output port: 'auto' (search for 86Box port), name substring, or 0-based index.
midi._channel_comment: MIDI channel filter for input: 'all' or channel number 1-16.
